title: Skill Configuration
description: Per-installation configuration for the plant management skill: timezone, locale, push policies, evaluation defaults.

timezone.description: IANA timezone for evaluation and scheduling, e.g. 'Europe/Rome'.

locale.description: Locale hint for AI message generation, e.g. 'it', 'en'.

pushPolicy.description: Controls how aggressively reminders are re-sent.

weatherRequired.description: If true, evaluation will fail without weather context.

dryRunDefault.description: If true, eval defaults to dry-run mode.

activeHours.description: [start, end] hours when reminders can be sent.

minHoursBetweenPushes.description: Minimum hours between pushes. Can be a single number or an object mapping time ranges to hours.
